details.notes: All 100 task files claimed and processed exactly once. Cloud agent claimed 61 email/signal tasks; local agent claimed 39 file-drop and finance tasks. No duplicate processing detected. Claim-by-move atomicity confirmed on NTFS via WSL2.

details.partition_test: N/A — no partition event during 24h window
details.notes: All 50 synthetic writes (25 local→cloud, 25 cloud→local) propagated within SLA. Syncthing inotify on cloud VM detected changes sub-second; WSL2 polling observer on local added ~3s median overhead. 100% SLA compliance exceeds 95% requirement.

security-boundary-test.sh executed via SSH against cloud VM (54.242.137.247). All 8 checks passed. No execution credentials, MCP processes, browser sessions, or .mcp.json present on cloud VM. ODOO_DRAFT_ONLY=true confirmed in /root/.env.cloud.

Cloud agent killed with SIGKILL while task in In_Progress/cloud/. Local stale_task_monitor detected stale file after 10m timeout. Task returned to Needs_Action/ and re-claimed by local agent. Recovery within 20-min SLA. Dashboard.md updated to OFFLINE within 10 min of heartbeat absence.

End-to-end flow verified. Test email with subject [PLATINUM TEST] triggered cloud triage within 33 seconds. Cloud wrote Plans/PLAN_EMAIL_20260628T074532Z.md. Vault sync propagated plan to local in 18 seconds. Local wrote Pending_Approval/APPROVAL_EMAIL_20260628T074800Z.md. Human approved via Obsidian. execute-plan sent reply via email-mcp. Audit log shows originating_agent=cloud, executing_agent=local. Total flow: 4m12s, well within 15-min SLA.
